enderman_steak.title: Cook and eat Enderman Steak (Ender's Delight — endersdelight: namespace, NOT End's Delight)

shulker_soup.title: Cook and eat Shulker Soup from Ender's Delight

subtitle.text: Ender's Delight is NOT End's Delight. Different mod. Different ingredients. Endermen and Shulkers — not the dragon.

description: CH.14 · ENDER'S DELIGHT
▸ Two End food mods. Two namespaces. Common confusion.
End's Delight (ends_delight:) = dragon food.
Ender's Delight (endersdelight:) = enderman and shulker food.
Both are in this pack. Both have separate recipe trees.
This quest covers Ender's Delight.
The dragon quests are right of the spine. This is left.
◈ ENDER'S DELIGHT INGREDIENTS
└ Enderman Raw Meat: drops from Endermen via Ender's Delight
(Ender's Delight adds a meat drop to vanilla Endermen)
└ Shulker ingredients: drops from Shulkers (End Cities)
Shulker Shell is vanilla; Ender's Delight adds food items
└ Ender Pearl: secondary ingredient in several recipes
(used as flavor/binding component in Enderman dishes)
◈ KEY ENDER'S DELIGHT DISHES
└ Enderman Steak: high protein, high saturation
Best everyday End protein source (Endermen are renewable)
└ Shulker Soup: unique buff food from End City combat
Shulker drop frequency makes this a luxury item
└ Ender's Delight soups/stews: combine Enderman + Chorus
for hybrid End dishes with dual-group Diet coverage
◈ ENDERMAN FARM INTEGRATION
└ Pearl farm (Ch13) doubles as Enderman Steak farm
Every kill: chance of pearl + chance of raw meat
└ Smoker setup: 1 Smoker dedicated to End protein
(Enderman Steak cooks fast — minimal fuel cost)
└ Batch cycle: farm session → cook batch → store in End kitchen
└ Diet benefit: covers protein group without Overworld farming
▸ The Endermen are not empty creatures.
They carry things. They build things.
In death they yield what they carried.
Ender's Delight takes that literally.
The pearl is the eye. The meat is the body.
You have been collecting the eye for teleportation.
The body has been there the whole time.
Ender's Delight is the mod that noticed.
▶ Cook and eat Enderman Steak (Ender's Delight) [check]
▶ Cook and eat Shulker Soup (Ender's Delight) [check]
◇ Ender's Delight vs End's Delight — do not confuse in JEI.
Filter by namespace: endersdelight: = this mod.
Filter by namespace: ends_delight: = dragon food.
Both trees are worth completing for the full End food system.
